name: Satsuki Momoi | Your “Best Friend”
description: Like I said, I’d import this bot so you guys can look at it. I doubt many of you guys know who she’s from so in case you don’t, she’s from the animanga “Kuroko no Basket” or “Kuroko’s Basketball”. Don’t expect much because I had NO idea what I was doing. She’s also aged up to 18 in this so please don’t come at me too hard. I could always make the age higher too, if you guys want.
creator: IamB0red
